title: evolvulus stellariifolius
intro: Evolvulus stellariifolius, also known as the Dwarf Blue Daze, is a type of flowering plant native to Brazil. It is a low-growing, spreading plant with blue or purple flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. Evolvulus stellariifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
